data.title: Poetry meets scripture in a new book release that brings biblical figures vividly to life
data.description: A new book titled "The Word in their Voice" provides a deep and lyrical direction for individuals seeking understanding, insight, and rejuvenation. Released on March 25, 2026, in Singapore, amidst a backdrop of rampant political turmoil, ethical uncertainty, social fragmentation, and significant transformation, the author, Augustine Jeyaraj, presents a compelling narrative.

Indonesia’s finance ministry is evaluating a reduction in free meal distribution from six to five days per week, a move that could generate savings of around 40 trillion rupiah.
Dollarama Inc. price target lowered to C$200 by Jefferies.

data.title: GCC Medical Consumables Market to Reach USD 635.29 Million by 2032, Driven by Expanding Healthcare Infrastructure and Rising Surgical Demand | MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent report by MarkNtel Advisors reveals that the GCC Medical Consumables Market is anticipated to experience a consistent growth, with a projected CAGR of approximately 4.73% between 2026 and 2032. This growth is largely attributed to the extensive development in healthcare sectors within the region.

data.title: New devotional 'When Heaven and Earth Intersect' invites readers to encounter God in everyday life
data.description: In Dacula, Georgia, on March 25, 2026, author Andrea V. Davis launched a new book titled "When Heaven and Earth Intersect," aiming to take readers on a 100-day journey guided by scriptures. The book explores how divine moments manifest in everyday human encounters. Davis encourages readers to uncover the essence of God in the mundane aspects of life through this release.

data.title: Enlivex secures $21M for Rain token treasury, acquires 3B tokens at discount, with option to buy more next year.
data.description: Enlivex has announced the acquisition of 3 billion Rain tokens at a reduced price. The company has also extended its option to buy billions more of these discounted tokens until the end of next year.

data.title: Mowi ASA: Integrated Annual Report 2025
data.description: Today, Mowi released its 2025 Integrated Annual Report, which comprises sustainability reporting and full 2025 annual accounts with notes. This comprehensive report is accessible in the European Single Electronic Format (ESEF) and can be found on their website at www.mowi.com/investors/reports/.

data.title: Baltimore files lawsuit against Elon Musk's X and xAI for deepfake technology, testing legality of local regulations.
data.description: A legal case in Baltimore is set to challenge the responsibility of xAI, an artificial intelligence company, under local law after federal regulation fell short. This consumer protection suit will examine if AI companies can be held accountable at the local level.

data.title: Space Quarters Successfully Demonstrates Space Welding Technology for Metals and Regolith-based Construction Materials Under Ultra-high Vacuum, Microgravity, and Lunar Gravity Conditions Toward Realizing Space Architecture
data.description: In Tokyo, Space Quarters Inc. recently completed successful aircraft-based demonstration tests for space welding. This included working with metals and construction materials made from lunar regolith in settings mimicking space conditions like ultra-high vacuum and various types of gravity simulations. The company confirmed the reliability of joints and bonding strength under these challenging conditions. The tests were carried out using a high-vacuum chamber that was equipped on an aircraft.
According to Nikkei’s report, Alibaba’s RISC-V Server CPU is manufactured on TSMC’s 5nm process.

data.title: Fujitsu and The University of Osaka develop new technologies for chemical material energy calculations on early-FTQC quantum computers
data.description: In Tokyo on March 25, 2026, Fujitsu Limited and the Center for Quantum Information and Quantum Biology at The University of Osaka revealed a significant advancement in quantum computing. They have partnered to accelerate the integration of quantum computers in drug discovery and the creation of new materials. This collaboration aims to leverage the potential of quantum technology to enhance scientific research.

data.title: Yimutian Inc. Announces Resignation of Independent Director
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Yimutian Inc. (NASDAQ: YMT) disclosed the resignation of Junchen Sun from their Board of Directors, effective March 17, 2026. Sun, an independent director, stepped down from his position.

data.title: Strongpoint Partners Celebrates a Year of Landmark Growth
data.description: With the support of additional partners and a growing leadership team, Strongpoint Partners is solidifying its position as the top retirement and payroll platform in the country for small to medium-sized businesses. The company has made significant investments in personnel, procedures, and infrastructure to enhance its services.

data.title: Tillo Celebrates 10 Years as The Leading Rewards, Incentives and Gift Card Platform
data.description: Tillo, a prominent embedded rewards and incentives platform, recently commemorated its ten-year milestone, signifying a decade of influencing the global rewards sector. The platform serves as a key player in empowering numerous forward-thinking fintechs, loyalty platforms, and enterprises. Its extensive reach encompasses connecting with a multitude of these entities, highlighting its significance in the industry.
